title: Demon Craft 2
description: Lightweight Vanilla+ experience with create and other quality of life mods!
body:
### About the Modpack
This modpack is intended for use on the Demon Craft 2 Minecraft server and provides a Vanilla+ experience with quality-of-life enhancements from mods such as:


- Ftb Quests
- Ftb Teams
- Ftb Chunks
- Simple Voicechat
- Immersive Aircraft
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Create
- Farmer's Delight
- Terralith
- Tectonic
- Celestisynth
- L_Ender 's Cataclysm Delight
- Mowzie's Mobs

The main focus of this modpack is the Create mod and its many add-ons, along with exploration of the numerous dungeons and structures scattered throughout the world. There is a questline to guide you through all the different mods of this pack.
If you’re looking for a modpack that isn’t overly technical, give this one a try!

### Performance
The modpack is relatively lightweight and can run on older hardware. Shader settings and render distance should be adjusted based on your system.

Minimum Requirements (at 1920×1080):

8 GB RAM

2 GB VRAM (GTX 1650)

2 CPU cores

Recommended (at 2560×1440):

12 GB RAM

8 GB VRAM

8 CPU cores

**IMPORTANT**

Change the amount of RAM Minecraft is allowed to use to atleast 8GB in the Modrinth Modpack Profile settings.

### Server Integration and Singleplayer Use
Although this modpack was created for the Demon Craft 2 server, it also works well in singleplayer. Server files may be made available for download in the future.

Link to the online Server Map:[http://format-reception.gl.at.ply.gg:29710](http://format-reception.gl.at.ply.gg:29710)

Link to the Server status page: [https://craftydc2.duckdns.org:45051/status](https://craftydc2.duckdns.org:45051/status)


### Work in Progress

This modpack is still not finished and there will be changes in the future. There is a public server i made for my friends that is going to start to run 24/7 during the summer holidays in 2025. If you see the server as online you can join it and help playtesting.

Link to Discord for suggestions on the modpack:[https://discord.gg/9nsnaHeKbJ](https://discord.gg/9nsnaHeKbJ)
